title: Essentials TPA Whitelist GUI
description: A simple GUI for Essentials that lets you turn /tptoggle into whitelist mode or blacklist mode.
body:
A simple GUI addon for EssentialsX that lets players manage who can teleport to them.

**What It Does**
Adds an inventory menu to /tptoggle so players can whitelist or blacklist specific users instead of blocking everyone. Click a block in the menu to switch between modes.

**Why Use This?**
Existing /tptoggle command is an all or nothing. You either allow teleport requests from everyone or no one. This plugin allows you to whitelist/blacklist specific users.

**Requirements**
Paper/Spigot 1.20 - 1.21
Requires Essentials

**Usage**
Run _/tptoggle_ to open the menu.


The simple menu for the plugin


![The simple menu for the plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/031e9705c8d044508b38aacffad21ee1b7025c01.png)

A simple information system showing players how to use the commands
![A simple information system showing players how to use the commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dd91cafbb812957540020eb866f7381474f4fca.png)

The plugin can be set to either whitelist mode or blacklist mode. This can be configured by just clicking on the block.

Whitelist mode


![Whitelist mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fbbed6c1626d00bb3d850a4a170e1b446b00ca7.png)

Blacklist mode


![Blacklist mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cafc14ea07d7f55f5e52431308fc82b277eb0049.png)
